title: BR-001
statement: The company needs an operating system for AI-native work so human requests, Agent work, local runners, reviews, and reusable knowledge form one traceable production loop.
whyItMatters: Without this, Agent work stays scattered across chats, files, local computers, and hidden human memory.
successSignal: A request can be traced from intake to requirement, task, runner, result, review, knowledge, notification, and metrics.
